ess-beta-metadata.label: Persistent absences for all pupils
ess-beta-metadata.subtitle: Percentage of pupils in state-funded schools that were absent for 10% of academic year
ess-beta-metadata.longDescription: This indicator shows the percentage of pupils in state-funded primary, state-funded secondary and special schools that were persistently absent (those absent for 10% of schooling sessions) during the academic year, in England (state-funded schools), for academic years 2006/07 to 2024/25.
ess-beta-metadata.caveats:
Data is not available for academic year 2019/20.

Total includes state-funded primary, secondary and special schools.

Sessions recorded as not attending due to COVID circumstances are included as possible sessions in 2020/21 and 2021/22 only, but not as an absence within absence rates.
